area.value: creature touched or all creatures within 5 ft.; see text

description.value: A shimmering mantle of light shrouds the subject, light like a torch. The subject of the spell gains a +1 resistance bonus on all saving throws per four caster levels (maximum +5 at 20th level). The subject can end the wrathful mantle at any time as a swift action to deal 2d8 points of force damage to all creatures within 5 feet. Section 15: Copyright Notice Advanced Player’s Guide.
